D1 Optics L5 Evaluate Reference

Fresnel Zone Plate

block alternate Fresnel zones and watch flat rings focus light like a lens

Divide a wavefront into annular zones whose edges differ by half a wavelength of path to the focus. Block every other zone and the survivors all add in phase there.

Set the focal length, wavelength, and number of zones. The plate is drawn to scale — note how the rings crowd together outward as √n. Higher-order foci appear at f/3, f/5, …
